action.reasoning: Observation: Trained model_v3 with strong region balance (0.8) for 11+ epochs. Best val worst was epoch 8 at 0.5679. This is LOWER than model.pt's val worst (0.5915) and model_v2 (0.6115). However, region balancing 0.8 strongly upweights Africa during training, so model_v3 may generalize differently to test. ~5.85h, 6 iters left. Best test=0.4663. Analysis: Should ensemble model_v3 with existing ensemble. The diversity (different seed/balance) may help even though single-model val is lower. Decision: Submit eval with 4-way ensemble model.pt + wise_alpha0.90 + model_v2 + model_v3.
